name: Great Shogun Shien
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>軍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control 2 or more face-up "Six Samurai" monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Your opponent can only activate 1 Spell/Trap Card each turn. If this card would be destroyed, you can destroy a face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control instead.
mnst_eff: If you control 2 or more face-up "Six Samurai" monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Your opponent can only activate 1 Spell/Trap Card each turn. If this card would be destroyed, you can destroy a face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control instead.
eff: If you control 2 or more face-up "Six Samurai" monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Your opponent can only activate 1 Spell/Trap Card each turn. If this card would be destroyed, you can destroy a face-up "Six Samurai" monster you control instead.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
